transcript: In American prisons, the mouths and buttocks of 800 inmates are sewn together to form a long human centipede. The inmates eat and defecate on the centipede. The warden of this prison is a pervert. He tied the prisoner to a table and covered his face with a towel. Then he poured boiling water on the prisoner's face. Just because he cursed the warden, the torture caused the prisoner to scream and his face was completely disfigured. Most of the inmates in this prison had bad attitudes and short tempers and were very difficult to manage. At first, the warden's punishment was to sterilize them. This psychopathic warden was obsessed with testicles. He had the chef take the cut-off balls and make them into western food for his own enjoyment. But this also increased the prison's medical costs. The assistant proposed to connect the prisoners' heads and buttocks together to make a human centipede for easy and uniform management. The warden agreed. He used a tranquilizer gun to I'll see you next time. The assistant proposed to connect the prisoners' heads and buttocks together to make a human centipede for easy and uniform management. The warden agreed. He used a tranquilizer gun to anesthetize the inmates one by one and sent someone to drag them into the operating room. Those prisoners who had cursed the warden were removed from their limbs and then connected to each other.
